title: ecooe 2x350ml Double Walled Coffee Glasses Mugs Cappuccino Latte Macchiato Glasses Cups with Handle Borosilicate Heat Resistant Glass Cups for Coffee Tea Milk Juice Ice Cream
features: Double Wall: The double wall design keeps the cup safe to touch with hot drinks and free of condensation with cold ones. And also keeps your drinks hot or cold for longer than one layer glasses under the same conditions.

Chic Appearance: Double wall and clear body create a floating illusion that makes your drinks more appealing. A perfect choice for coffee, tea, desserts and more. A great addition to any table and occasion.

Borosilicate Glass: Adopting superior borosilicate glass, the cup is made lighter, more clear and explosive-proof to high temperature. And it allows you to fill boiling water into the frozen cup instantly.
Wonderful Gift Choice: It is a nice gift for any occasion, birthdays, anniversaries, housewarming, engagements or weddings.
Guarantte: Ecooe 2×350ml double wall glass cups, 18-month hassle-free warranty and our friendly customer service. All glass articles are brittle, so be careful when using or washing.
description: Product Description The customers are delighted Double Wall Design Considerable design for all hot and cold beverage.Keeping safe in touching with hot drinks,and free of condensation with chilled drinkds. Meanwhile keeping hot or cold for longer. Borosilicate Glass Lighter, more durable and heat-resistant(-30℃ to 150℃) than traditional glass. Master Hand-made Purely hand blowing with high standards and quality. Customer-oriented Ecooe always pursue high quality product and customer oriented. If you have any problem with products, please do not worry, we will solve your problems as soon as possible. Conditionaly Dishwasher Safe It can be used in the upper dishwasher compartment with a gentle cycle at a maximum of 45℃.
